title: Generated waivers for multiline are incorrect
body:
Multiline warnings cause issues with waiver files, for example `VARHIDDEN`
```
%Warning-VARHIDDEN: ../src/openhw_cv32e40p_core_0.1/rtl/riscv_id_stage.sv:57:13: Declaration of signal hides declaration in upper scope: 'WAPUTYPE'
   57 |   parameter WAPUTYPE          =  0,
      |             ^~~~~~~~
                    ../src/openhw_cv32e40p_core_0.1/rtl/include/apu_core_package.sv:38:13: ... Location of original declaration
   38 |   parameter WAPUTYPE         =  0;
      |       
```
Truncate and add a wildcard star solves it, maybe this should be done when writing.
code_blocks:
%Warning-VARHIDDEN: ../src/openhw_cv32e40p_core_0.1/rtl/riscv_id_stage.sv:57:13: Declaration of signal hides declaration in upper scope: 'WAPUTYPE'
   57 |   parameter WAPUTYPE          =  0,
      |             ^~~~~~~~
                    ../src/openhw_cv32e40p_core_0.1/rtl/include/apu_core_package.sv:38:13: ... Location of original declaration
   38 |   parameter WAPUTYPE         =  0;
      |
